texto: Health and programming should go together like a horse and carriage. You can't have one without the other. In our sedentary office work, we often forget that an absence of health is as bad as a lack of programming skills.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Staffan Noteberg: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a trabalho. O trecho “Health and programming should go together like a horse and carriage. You can't have one without t…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, health, programming pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e programming.
